children.heading: Fiscal years 2020 and 2021
children.label: 2 Fiscal years 2020 and 2021
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to the Administrator to carry out this chapter $50,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2020 and 2021, to remain available until expended.

children.heading: Fiscal years 2022 through 2026
children.label: 3 Fiscal years 2022 through 2026
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to the Administrator to carry out this chapter $50,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2022 through 2026, to remain available until expended.

children.heading: Fiscal years 2015 through 2019
children.label: 1 Fiscal years 2015 through 2019
children.text: Of the funds made available to carry out this chapter, the Secretary or the Administrator, as applicable, may use for the administration of this chapter, including for the provision of technical assistance to aid project sponsors in obtaining the necessary approvals for the project, not more than $2,200,000 for each of fiscal years 2015 through 2019.

children.heading: Fiscal years after 2019
children.label: 2 Fiscal years after 2019
children.text: Of the funds made available to carry out this chapter, the Administrator may use for the administration of this chapter, including for the provision of technical assistance to aid project sponsors in obtaining the necessary approvals for the project, not more than $5,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2022 through 2026.

children.heading: Small community water infrastructure projects
children.label: c Small community water infrastructure projects

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: For each fiscal year, the Secretary or the Administrator, as applicable, shall set aside not less than 15 percent of the amounts made available for that fiscal year under this section for small community water infrastructure projects described in .section 3907(a)(2)(B) of this title

children.heading: Administration
children.label: 2 Administration
children.text: Any amounts set aside under paragraph (1) that remain unobligated on June 1 of the fiscal year for which the amounts are set aside shall be available for obligation by the Secretary or the Administrator, as applicable, for projects other than small community water infrastructure projects.

children.heading: Additional funding
children.label: d Additional funding
children.text: Notwithstanding , the Secretary or the Administrator, as applicable, may make available up to 25 percent of the amounts made available for each fiscal year under this section for loans in excess of 49 percent of the total project costs.section 3908(b)(2) of this title

children.heading: Assistance for State infrastructure financing authorities
children.label: e Assistance for State infrastructure financing authorities

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: With respect to fiscal years 2022 through 2026, if the Administrator has available for obligation in a fiscal year at least $50,000,000, there is authorized to be appropriated to the Administrator $5,000,000 for that fiscal year to provide financial assistance for projects described in to State infrastructure financing authorities.section 3905(9) of this title

children.heading: No impact on other Federal funding
children.label: 2 No impact on other Federal funding
A
children.text: the total amount appropriated for the fiscal year for State loan funds under is less than either the amount made available for such purpose in fiscal year 2018, or 105 percent of the previous fiscal year’s appropriation for such purpose, whichever is greater; andsection 300j–12 of title 42

children.label: B
children.text: the total amount appropriated for the fiscal year for water pollution control revolving funds under title VI of the Federal Water Pollution Control Act [ et seq.] is less than either the amount made available for such purpose for fiscal year 2018, or 105 percent of the previous fiscal year’s appropriation for such purpose, whichever is greater.33 U.S.C. 1381

children.heading: Inclusion in agreement
children.label: 3 Inclusion in agreement
children.text: If the Administrator provides financial assistance to a State infrastructure financing authority under using funds made available pursuant to this subsection, the Administrator shall specify in the agreement under such section the amount of such assistance that is attributable to such funds.section 3908 of this title
